reviews.review_description:
Short and simple introduction into VR controls. I wish it would support more languages, but understandable to only include english (and swedish as that's where the devs are from) for a small project like this.
Some people seem to be confused by the shortness of this tutorial, but it is supposed to be like this.

Everytime i finish the first one of moving the robot arm with the box and then open the 2 doors. When i get to the door with the keypad the game resets.

Is this right?

reviews.review_title: Can’t get the code thug to work
reviews.review_description:
Every time I go to the key pad it just resets the game.


Devs is this Supposed to happen?￼
This short, well-designed and effective app had me navigating a new VR space in no time. It was fun!
I can’t get to the code thing and type 1234
